name: Tony Rock
bio: Tony Rock is an American stand-up comedian, actor, and television host known for high-energy crowd work and observational sets on culture and relationships. The younger brother of Chris Rock, he built a hosting resume across BET, NBA TV, and HBO while acting in series including All of Us and Everybody Hates Chris. He released his debut stand-up special, Rock the World, in 2024.

timeline.ev: Begins recurring role on the UPN sitcom All of Us
Plays Uncle Ryan on Everybody Hates Chris
Releases debut special Rock the World via Comedy Dynamics

accolades: Host of HBO's All Def Comedy stand-up series
Released debut stand-up special Rock the World (2024)
